sql_array: CREATE TABLE soap_messages (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, body_str TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

SELECT xenc_decrypt_soap (body_str, 11, 6, 'UTF-8', 'x-any', vector('UsernameToken', vector('label', 'Application-Label', 'keyAlgorithm', 'http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#tripledes-cbc')), NULL) AS decrypted_msg FROM soap_messages WHERE xpath_integer('/soapenv:Envelope/soapenv:Body/tns:Message', body_str) > 0;

SELECT xpath_integer('/soapenv:Envelope/soapenv:Body/tns:Action', body_str) AS action_id, xenc_decrypt_soap(body_str, 11, 6, 'UTF-8', 'x-any', vector('UsernameToken', vector('label', 'Application-Label', 'keyAlgorithm', 'http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#tripledes-cbc')), NULL) FROM soap_messages WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM soap_messages WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day');

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xenc_decrypt_soap(body_str, 11, 6, 'UTF-8', 'x-any', vector('UsernameToken', NULL), NULL) AS decrypted_msg FROM soap_messages WHERE body_str IS NOT NULL) AS decrypted_messages WHERE xpath_integer('/soapenv:Envelope/soapenv:Body/tns:Message', decrypted_msg) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE message_logs (log_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, message_id INTEGER, log_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (message_id) REFERENCES soap_messages(id));

SELECT l.log_id, m.body_str, xenc_decrypt_soap(m.body_str, 11, 6, 'UTF-8', 'x-any', vector('UsernameToken', vector('label', NULL, 'keyAlgorithm', 'http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#tripledes-cbc')), NULL) AS verified_message FROM message_logs l JOIN soap_messages m ON l.message_id = m.id WHERE ISNULL(xpath_integer('/soapenv:Envelope/soapenv:Body/tns:Message', m.body_str));
SELECT xpath_integer('count(/soapenv:Envelope/soapenv:Body/*[local-name()="Message"]/*[local-name()="Action"])', body_str) AS action_count, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count FROM soap_messages;
